text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital has finished her spring<n>tour of the
senior G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What's the word, Trainer? What do<n>you think of
my results?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I've been running constantly just likewe planned, right? It's been amazing,right? Nudge, nudge!
choice_data_list: You're not just an all-rounder, you're the All-Rounder!
You're not just an all-rounder, you're the All-Rounder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, hearing that never gets old! ♪<n>Guess I'll
keep doing what I need to<n>live up to that praise.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She certainly has been exceptional.<n>And now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The time has come. A battle to rival<n>Sekigahara...
Hulao Pass... Midnight<n>on merch drop days! In
other words—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's go time! I'll be going up against<n>Opera O and
Doto in the battle to end<n>all battles!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've experienced so many things<n>leading up to
this point.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've grappled with countless runners<n>on both turf
and dirt.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I may not have any distinguishing<n>strengths, but I
stand out by taking on<n>anyone, anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Each step I've taken has set the<n>stage for
what's now to come!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll put all of the experience I've<n>gained running
both turf and dirt to<n>good use... and I'll overcome
my two<n>idols!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And not only that, my performance<n>itself will be a
celebration symbolizing<n>how utterly magnificent
Umamusume<n>are! It's the ultimate simping!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's time to put "Project Digitan" into<n>action!
Trainer, which racecourse<n>should be the stage for
my great<n>finale this fall?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A true hero doesn't choose their<n>battlefield, but
let's make an<n>exception today. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: We put our heads together to think.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
First of all, we can forget about dirt. Of<n>the three of
us, I'm the only one of us<n>who can run on it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That rules out miles as well. I'm fine<n>with short
distances, but the others<n>are better built for
medium and<n>long-distance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, how about...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HWHAT?! Say that one more time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking exactly the same thing,<n>and you
repeating it just sealed the<n>deal.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What better place to bring out the best<n>in Opera O
and Doto than a<n>2,000-meter turf race at Tokyo
Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And that's where I'll do it! I'm gonna<n>be a star!
No! Even better—I'm gonna<n>be an oshi!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, why wouldn't it be?
choice_data_list: You're putting yourself at a disadvantage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh... Well...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
2,000 meters of Tokyo turf truly<n>makes for the
quintessential<n>medium-distance race. It's the
perfect stage to test one's true<n>ability.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's no trick that will guarantee a<n>win. Skill and
skill alone must carry us<n>to victory against
opponents as<n>powerful as T.M. Opera O and
Meisho<n>Doto.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're absolutely right, but... what are<n>you gonna
do? It's just my nature.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna see my adorable Umas<n>where they can
shine their brightest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna drag them into my lane<n>and cheese
a win. At that point, I'd<n>rather just not run in the
first place.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Shine bright, my Umas! And shine<n>even brighter,
Digitan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: This is what it means to be cool!This is the definition of simping!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, are you with me, Trainer? Will you<n>indulge me
in this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I knew you were a real one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Not that I ever doubted you, hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital knows no doubt—it isn't<n>in her DNA
as an obsessive fangirl.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The exceptional All-Rounder is<n>running in the
autumn Tenno Sho. And<n>the news spreads like
wildfire<n>throughout Tracen Academy.
